SQLLite.SQL: ( SELECT AD.DEBT_SEQ AS "DebtSeqNumber" , AD.DEBT_CASE_NUMBER AS "CaseNumber" , P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME AS "CreditorName" , AD.DEBT_STATUS AS "DebtStatus" FROM ALLOWED_DEBTS AD , PARTIES P , GIVEN_ADDRESSES GA WHERE AD.DEBT_CO_NUMBER = ${param.coNumber} AND GA.ALD_SEQ = AD.DEBT_SEQ AND P.PARTY_ID = GA.PARTY_ID AND GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'CO CRED' AND GA.VALID_TO IS NULL ) UNION ( SELECT AD.DEBT_SEQ AS "DebtSeqNumber" , AD.DEBT_CASE_NUMBER AS "CaseNumber" , P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME AS "CreditorName" , AD.DEBT_STATUS AS "DebtStatus" FROM ALLOWED_DEBTS AD , PARTIES P WHERE AD.DEBT_CO_NUMBER = ${param.coNumber} AND P.PARTY_ID = AD.CP_CREDITOR_ID )
